title: malaxis nutans
intro: Malaxis nutans, also known as the nut-rimmed adder's mouth, is a type of orchid that belongs to the Malaxis genus. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Malaxis nutans include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a remedy for digestive problems and skin conditions. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in herbal infusions or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
